bead.title: Migrate agent/exec/session/metrics routes to project-scoped paths
bead.description:
## Scope
Complete the project-scoped route migration for all remaining route groups: agent, exec, sessions, and metrics.

## Context
ddx-36d2775f adds the middleware and migrates document/bead/graph routes. This bead handles the remaining routes using the same pattern.

## Depends on
ddx-36d2775f (route middleware must land first)

## Files to touch
- cli/internal/server/server.go — register remaining scoped routes
- Handler files for agent, exec, sessions, metrics — use project context
bead.acceptance: (1) Agent routes (run, workers, workers/{id}, workers/{id}/log, workers/{id}/prompt, coordinators, sessions, sessions/{id}), exec routes (dispatch, definitions, runs, runs/{id}, runs/{id}/log), and metrics routes (summary, cost, cycle-time, rework) are registered under /api/projects/{project}/... using the project middleware from ddx-36d2775f. (2) Legacy unscoped routes preserved as singleton aliases. (3) cd cli && go test ./internal/server -count=1 passes (no regressions).
